title: Recover your FTMO account with my automated USAI system
author: tradermejia
selftext:
I execute it when I see an opportunity and I remain under supervision after each trade. It's very good at risk management and applies the Trailing Stop very well.


(05.01.2025 was my first trade due to manual, emotional trading)
I'm surprised and I'm learning how the system I created works.


*USAI runs locally on my PC. It is not shared or for sale. I will continue testing and will keep you updated.
